printed.name: Spine Twist Supine
printed.setup: Lying supine with lower back and pelvis on barrel, legs in tabletop position, thighs perpendicular to floor, hands holding handles

movement.exhale: Lift legs to center, return to start position

cues: Initiate rotation to side and back to center with abdominals
Move legs and pelvis as one unit
Keep holding handles firmly and pulling barrel toward back
